net.dapete.exceptional.function.ExIntConsumer

Packages that use ExIntConsumer
Package
Description
net.dapete.exceptional.stream
This package provides utilities for handling checked exceptions in Streams.

  • Uses of ExIntConsumer in net.dapete.exceptional.stream

    Methods in net.dapete.exceptional.stream with parameters of type ExIntConsumer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ExIntMapMultiConsumer.accept(int value, ExIntConsumer<E> ic)
    Replaces the given value with zero or more values by feeding the mapped values to the ic consumer.
    void
    ExIntStream.exForEach(ExIntConsumer<?> action)
    Equivalent of IntStream.forEach(IntConsumer).
    void
    ExIntStream.exForEachOrdered(ExIntConsumer<?> action)
    Equivalent of IntStream.forEachOrdered(IntConsumer).

    ExIntStream.exPeek(ExIntConsumer<?> action)
